script_en: Message from General Pepper. Priority one!
We need your help, Star Fox!
and is trying to take over Corneria!
Our army alone can't do the job! Hurry, Star Fox!

Corneria, fourth planet of the Lylat system. The evil Andross turned this once thriving system into a wasteland of near extinction. General Pepper of the Cornerian army was successful in exiling this maniacal scientist to the barren, deserted planet Venom. Five years later, General Pepper noticed strange activity coming from Venom. James McCloud, Pigma Dengar, and Peppy Hare of the Star Fox team were sent to investigate. Upon their arrival, Pigma betrayed the team and James and Peppy were captured by Andross. Peppy barely escaped Venom and returned home to tell James' son Fox about his father's fate. A few years have passed. Andross has again invaded the Lylat system. General Pepper has turned to a new Star Fox team headed by Fox McCloud to save Corneria and free the Lylat system once again.
script_pt:
Corneria, quarto planeta do sistema
Lylat. O maligno Andross transformou
este sistema, outrora próspero, em um
deserto à beira da extinção.
 
O General Pepper, do exército
corneriano, conseguiu exilar este
cientista maníaco para o planeta
Venom, estéril e deserto.
 
Cinco anos depois, o General Pepper
notou uma atividade estranha... vinda
de Venom. James McCloud, Pigma Dengar
e Peppy Hare, da equipe Star Fox,
foram enviados para investigar.
 
Ao chegarem, Pigma traiu a equipe e
James e Peppy foram capturados por
Andross.
 
Peppy escapou por pouco de Venom e
voltou para casa para contar ao
filho de James, Fox, sobre o destino
de seu pai.
 
Alguns anos se passaram. Andross
invadiu novamente o sistema Lylat.
 
O General Pepper recorreu a uma nova
equipe Star Fox, liderada por Fox
McCloud, para salvar Corneria e
libertar o sistema Lylat mais uma vez.
